description_html:
CHRONO-SYNC explores a rare moment where time opens in both directions, allowing the past and future to meet. As people cross into each other’s worlds, ancient traditions and
advanced technology are shared with curiosity and respect. Neither seeks to replace the other instead, both learn, adapt, and grow together. Through this timeless exchange, culture and
innovation find balance, reminding us that true progress is achieved when heritage and advancement move forward in harmony.
A captivating live performance where a gateway through time brings the past and future together. Through expressive acting and symbolic staging, ancient traditions and advanced innovation meet with curiosity and respect, creating a world where culture and progress grow in harmony.

Guidelines and Rules:

  • The play may be performed in English, Tamil, or Hindi.Original or adapted scripts are permitted.
  • Time limit: Performance: 30 minutes , Setup: 10 minutes
  • Vulgar, offensive, or inappropriate content is not allowed and may lead to disqualification.
  • Any damage to the stage or equipment will attract penalties.
  • The judges decision is final and binding.
